title: Fix: Buffer overflow in file parsing
original_text: Fixed buffer overflow in file parsing module. Added bounds checking for array operations. Implemented safe string handling functions. Added input validation for file size. Implemented memory safety checks. Result: buffer overflow fixed.
expected_subject: fix(core): fix buffer overflow in file parsing
expected_body_lines: - Add bounds checking for array operations
- Add input validation for file size
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(core): fix buffer overflow in file parsing"
